gaps: The provisioned snapshot exposed only a cluster URL, not the cluster metadata or petition-stage order text.
An event-specific prior command would be useful for SCOTUS petition-disposition labels.
helpful: fedcourts paths resolved the event location.
fedcourts stats provided aggregate SCOTUS base-rate context.
fedcourts query showed how comparable historical SCOTUS records are labeled.
notes: I used only the provisioned snapshot for case facts and used corpus stats/query for calibration. The sparse historical snapshot made the non-grant label distinction uncertain.
